title: Fast Fiction Factory Source-Span Routing Review Pack
purpose: Focused local review pack for checking source spans, source references, routing targets, confidence/default status, human-owned guards, risk flags, and review debt across the existing three deterministic adapter fixture outputs before freeform review or any model/API behavior.
validation_command: & { $files = @('public/review/index.html', 'tools/fff-state.mjs', 'tools/fff-extract-local.mjs', 'tools/fff-source-span-review-pack.mjs', 'artifacts/artifact-manifest.json', 'artifacts/ARTIFACTS.md', 'artifacts/source-span-routing-review-pack.json', 'artifacts/sample-raw-memo.md', 'artifacts/extraction-adapter-fixtures/clockmaker-sample.md', 'artifacts/extraction-adapter-fixtures/council-minutes-edge.md', 'artifacts/extraction-adapter-fixtures/observatory-ledger-edge.md', 'artifacts/extraction-adapter-outputs/clockmaker-sample.json', 'artifacts/extraction-adapter-outputs/council-minutes-edge.json', 'artifacts/extraction-adapter-outputs/observatory-ledger-edge.json', 'artifacts/local-extraction-adapter-expansion-smoke-result.json', 'artifacts/sample-project-state.json', 'artifacts/current-project-state.json', 'artifacts/sample-extraction-payload.json', 'artifacts/extraction-validator-smoke-result.json', 'docs/review/current-status.md', 'docs/review/source-span-routing-review-pack.md', 'docs/review/local-extraction-adapter-expansion-review.md', 'docs/review/extraction-validator-hardening-review.md', 'docs/review/extraction-contract-review.md', 'docs/review/freeform-review-intake.md', 'docs/data-model.md', 'scripts/operator/open_review.ps1'); $missing = $files | Where-Object { -not (Test-Path $_) }; if ($missing) { throw ('Missing files: ' + ($missing -join ', ')) }; $manifest = Get-Content artifacts/artifact-manifest.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($manifest.artifact_id -ne 'fff-source-span-routing-review-pack-001') { throw 'Manifest artifact id mismatch' }; if ($manifest.preserved_adapter_expansion_artifact_id -ne 'fff-local-extraction-adapter-expansion-001') { throw 'Preserved expansion artifact id mismatch' }; if ($manifest.review_input_mode -ne 'freeform') { throw 'Review input mode mismatch' }; node tools/fff-source-span-review-pack.mjs artifacts/extraction-adapter-fixtures artifacts/extraction-adapter-outputs artifacts/local-extraction-adapter-expansion-smoke-result.json artifacts/source-span-routing-review-pack.json; node tools/fff-extract-local.mjs --matrix artifacts/extraction-adapter-fixtures artifacts/extraction-adapter-outputs artifacts/local-extraction-adapter-expansion-smoke-result.json; Get-ChildItem artifacts/extraction-adapter-outputs -Filter *.json | ForEach-Object { node tools/fff-state.mjs validate-extraction $_.FullName; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw ('Adapter output validation failed: ' + $_.Name) } }; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate artifacts/current-project-state.json; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate artifacts/sample-project-state.json; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate-extraction artifacts/sample-extraction-payload.json; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate-extraction-fixtures artifacts/extraction-negative-fixtures; $pack = Get-Content artifacts/source-span-routing-review-pack.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; if (-not $pack.passed) { throw 'Source-span review pack failed' }; if ($pack.cross_fixture_summary.fixture_count -ne 3 -or $pack.cross_fixture_summary.total_elements -ne 36 -or $pack.cross_fixture_summary.profile_candidates -ne 27 -or $pack.cross_fixture_summary.claim_candidates -ne 20 -or $pack.cross_fixture_summary.timeline_candidates -ne 12) { throw 'Source-span review pack aggregate mismatch' }; if ($pack.cross_fixture_summary.source_span_mismatches -ne 0 -or $pack.cross_fixture_summary.missing_source_refs -ne 0 -or $pack.cross_fixture_summary.unsafe_visual_routing -ne 0 -or $pack.cross_fixture_summary.non_held_review_defaults -ne 0 -or $pack.cross_fixture_summary.human_owned_decision_adopt_suggestions -ne 0) { throw 'Source-span review pack guard mismatch' }; $html = Get-Content public/review/index.html -Raw; @('fff-source-span-routing-review-pack-001', 'Source-Span Routing Review Pack', 'artifacts/source-span-routing-review-pack.json', 'tools/fff-source-span-review-pack.mjs', 'clockmaker-sample', 'council-minutes-edge', 'observatory-ledger-edge', 'Review Debt', 'Toma fate', 'brass moth truth', 'Council motive') | ForEach-Object { if ($html -notmatch [regex]::Escape($_)) { throw ('Missing required Review Hub text: ' + $_) } }; Write-Output 'Source-span routing review pack validation passed' }
validation_result: pending; run the manifest validation command after this slice is applied
review_prompt_hint: Review the source-span routing pack in natural language. Useful feedback can mention weak or over-broad spans, extracted values that feel vague, routing targets that should move between Claim/Timeline/Profile/Visual/Human Review, defaults that feel too confident, or fixture classes that should be added before model/API integration.
next_action: Use the Review Hub source-span pack and artifacts/source-span-routing-review-pack.json for freeform supervision, then decide whether to revise local fixture routing/spans or add new source-span edge fixtures before any model/API adapter work.
